channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-31 08:50 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket
item.description: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket

item.title: @elonmusk: Remember when the problem with EVs was the cost of the battery? Yeah. Not a problem anymore.
item.description: Remember when the problem with EVs was the cost of the battery? Yeah. Not a problem anymore.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grokipedia is far superior to Wikipedia and it’s not even close, especially when it comes to neutral...
item.description: Grokipedia is far superior to Wikipedia and it’s not even close, especially when it comes to neutrality. Take Evie’s Wikipedia page: it’s been the target of a years-long hit job by a group of leftist activist editors who are blatantly breaking Wiki’s own rules, and they do this by defending each other’s edits while claiming consensus. When a factual edit is made, it’s immediately reversed because they’re watching the page. Grokipedia actually stays neutral and summarizes facts. It pulls straight from our own website and social media pages to describe what kind of content we publish (shocking!), instead of letting some opinionated leftist journalist slap their spin on everything. It reviews all sources, weighs bias, and references articles from the larger, widely trusted publications, instead of using Media Matters or Vice as “neutral sources” (lol). This is such important work from xAI because all these LLMs are out there scraping Wikipedia for their answers. If Wikipedia is full of false info or pushing a heavily biased take, then every AI chatbot ends up repeating the same garbage. Thank you@elonmusk.

item.title: @elonmusk: The 2026 Not-a-Boring Competition is officially underway in Bastrop, TX! Eight student teams watched...
item.description: The 2026 Not-a-Boring Competition is officially underway in Bastrop, TX! Eight student teams watched Prufrock-5 digging a test tunnel, toured the Boring Factory, and delivered their Mining Readiness Review presentations to our engineers. Beat the snail!

item.title: @elonmusk: In 4 or 5 years, there will be a launch every hour
item.description: In 4 or 5 years, there will be a launch every hour

item.title: @elonmusk: テスラのFSD自動運転で新宿駅前を通る。日本🇯🇵でも今年認可され、イーロンがポストしていたように日本のサービス拠点やスーパーチャージャーへの投資が加速すると一気にメジャーな車になるだろう。
item.description: テスラのFSD自動運転で新宿駅前を通る。日本🇯🇵でも今年認可され、イーロンがポストしていたように日本のサービス拠点やスーパーチャージャーへの投資が加速すると一気にメジャーな車になるだろう。

item.title: @elonmusk: Teslas are in tunnels under Vegas transporting millions of people
item.description: Teslas are in tunnels under Vegas transporting millions of people

item.title: @elonmusk: Best value out there by far. I won’t let my family drive anything else.
item.description: Best value out there by far. I won’t let my family drive anything else.

item.title: @elonmusk: 東京都在住の方が、今Teslaを購入すると、国の補助金127万円に加えて、東京都から40万円(最大80万円)の補助金を受け取ることができます。
item.description: 東京都在住の方が、今Teslaを購入すると、国の補助金127万円に加えて、東京都から40万円(最大80万円)の補助金を受け取ることができます。

item.title: @elonmusk: Imagine is positive gross margin for xAI!
